title: Theme Presets — unified switcher with bundled tweakcn registry
description: Runtime color preset swap on top of next-themes. Ships ONE component — ThemePresetSwitcher (Popover with light/dark/system mode tabs + grouped color preset list + hover preview + Default reset). Provider context (ThemePresetProvider) wraps state so deeply-nested consumers read via useThemePreset(). Registry (~30 curated tweakcn presets after HIDDEN filter) ships inside the slice as registry-data.json — no consumer public/ setup required, loaded lazily via dynamic import so the ~240KB JSON code-splits into its own chunk.
